indication: AYVAKIT is a kinase inhibitor indicated for the treatment of adults with unresectable or metastatic GIST harboring a platelet-derived growth factor receptor alpha (PDGFRA) exon 18 mutation, including PDGFRA D842V mutations.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to avapritinib for the treatment of adults with unresectable or metastatic GIST harboring a platelet-derived growth factor receptor alpha (PDGFRA) exon 18 mutation, including PDGFRA D842V mutations.
raw_biomarkers: PDGFRA exon 18 mutation, including PDGFRA D842V

document.name: Ayvakit (avapritinib) [package insert]. FDA.
